displayText.headline: The Warmth of Coming Home
displayText.footer: *Receive a signature welcome set on orders over $150.

style: luxury product photography dramatic low-key lighting single warm spotlight beam deep shadows gold accents ultra-minimalist editorial
description: A stark, high-contrast composition featuring a dark, textured obsidian stone backdrop. A single, dramatic golden-hued spotlight beam cuts diagonally across the canvas from the top-left, casting a brilliant highlight directly onto the luxury Vesper scented candle. The surrounding areas fade into rich, velvety shadows. The text is rendered in elegant Italiana and Lora typography, placed carefully in the negative space opposite the beam to maintain perfect structural balance.
